selection_policy: field packet selection is planning-only: exact-eval-ready rows sort first; otherwise the explicit lexicographic feasibility tuple orders byte-closed, clean, Pareto-frontier, KKT-proof-backed rows before pure expected-score deltas, with expected-information-gain as a tie-breaker; penalty terms are diagnostic only
